programme.desc: Join Madame Gaby at the caf for more fabulous French fun! It's time to head back to Paris, France and learn some of the most important French you will need to know... How to tell someone your name and that you love them! Will you join us? You will?!

programme.title: Learn Common Household Words with Woodzeez and Bluey for Kids!
programme.desc: Join the fun as we learn common words with Woodzeez and Bluey in this educational video for kids and toddlers! The Tailfeathers family is moving to a new toy house, and we'll help them decorate it after flying there in the Woodzeez toy airplane. Next,...

programme.title: Royal Heist
programme.desc: King Pig rescues a mistreated egg. After all, these things aren't exactly a dime-a-dozen! Are they?

programme.title: Teamwork
programme.desc: Kimberly and Trini gather enough signatures to close down a nearby polluting dumpsite. Unaware that the dumpsite is controlled by Rita, the girls go there and are attacked by Putties.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: THE WAWIES
programme.desc: Wawaland is a tiny world within planet Earth. So small and light that it gets carried away by the wind. Right now, it could be flying over Tokyo, Paris, or the Atlantic Ocean, completely unseen by humans. In this magical place live The Wawies—chubby and curious beings who are always asking questions and trying to make sense of the world around them and ours. Through Sha's far-away glasses, the Wawies can observe how humans behave on Earth and apply what they learn in their own world, sparking endless adventures that teach them, entertain them, help them explore their surroundings, and listen to themselves. They always stick together and never leave anyone behind. For example, this season, you might find them competing in their own version of Wawachef,” escaping from some not-so-friendly monkeys, deciding to ban rules in their world forever, trying to calm down some feisty ants, training their patience to care for a garden, or figuring out which costume party is more fun: Halloween or Carnival. With each adventure, Sha, Opo, Aca, Bow, and Tok strive to understand, grow, and have fun. And along the way, they'll unintentionally create their own set of rules to live in a place where respect and harmony with their surroundings are key. With its playful and cheerful tone, Wawaland seeks to show children a different way of seeing things—helping them appreciate the world around them and, most importantly, themselves.

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Berry and Dolly
programme.desc: Berry, the little snail boy and Dolly, the ladybird are best friends. Together they discover the world around them, while they make new friends with Balthazar the bee, Flutter the butterfly, Stanley the stag-beetle, Leapy the grasshopper, and many others.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here are the forever loved classics like Johny Johny Yes Papa, Wheels On The Bus and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Here's a fun collection of kids learning songs like Phonics Dance Song, This Old Man and much more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Let's charm the little ones with our peppy Teacher song, The Shark Song, Mr Sun and many more!

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben - Episode 2
programme.desc: Egyptian pyramid trap! Annie, Ben & Mango help mummy find treasure to escape. Beware booby-traps!

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie and Ben - Episode 3
programme.desc: The trio travel by submarine to the underwater city of Atlantis and help a mermaid and her dogfish who have a Giant Squid problem

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Nursery Rhymes are fun, especially when you are watching your favrotie, Baa Baa Black Sheep and more

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Sweet lullabies for peaceful slumber for kids. Hush Little Baby, Little miss Muffet and many more.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: This special collection includes Five Little Buses, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more fun melodies.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Soothing melodies designed to gently lull children into a peaceful slumber each night.

programme.title: Soothing Melodies
programme.desc: A journey of Soothing Melodies like Hush Little Baby, nurturing relaxation and sleep.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Blippi's Adventure and Discovery Tour
programme.desc: Join Blippi as he embarks on an exciting Adventure and Discovery Tour! Explore the fascinating jobs at Wimbledon, enjoy a fun-filled game of Mini Golf, and cheer on your favorite team at Liverpool FC. Watch Blippi get hands-on with recycling in Smash My Trash, and meet Stanley the Dinosaur for a roaring good time. Each adventure is packed with fun, learning, and new discoveries, making every moment with Blippi an unforgettable experience for kids.

programme.title: Blippi's Learning and Exploration Journey
programme.desc: Set off on a Learning and Exploration Journey with Blippi as he dives into the world of construction vehicles, exploring bulldozers and excavators up close! Discover the wonders of a Children's Museum and learn through play at the Cayton Children's Museum. Get a splash of color and knowledge as Blippi teaches kids about plants and colors in a fun and engaging way. These educational adventures are perfect for curious young minds, making learning exciting and interactive with Blippi.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: No Blueberry Is an Island
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does, so they can prepare accordingly—they see Strawberry wearing a diving mask and snorkel in the cafe, and race to the lake to practice scuba diving, not knowing she was only slicing onions.

programme.title: Where the Berry Breeze Blows
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here! She insists they can build a copy of “Berry Breezy Bay” resort on Berry Bitty Lake, a duplicate down to the last detail.

programme.title: I Want Cake!
programme.desc: Sid and his friends discover that only eating cake would make their bodies feel terrible. Then they explore and learn that the best way to stay healthy is by eating nutritious food.

programme.title: The Big Sneeze
programme.desc: Sid and his friends learn that germs are so small that you can't see them. And they discover that a great way to stay healthy and keep germs away is by washing their hands with soap and water!

programme.title: Tarzan and Jane
programme.desc: Baby Tarzan is rescued from a plane crash by the gorilla, Kala, and brought to a Shaman who treats Tarzan's injuries with a mix of native medicines and experimental science - saving Tarzan's life and giving him supernatural animal powers in the process. Tarzan is returned to Kala and remains in the jungle, defending animals from poachers, hunters and other threats. As a teenager, Tarzan is discovered by an expedition team from London, paid for by his billionaire grandfather. It is during this expedition where Tarzan meets Jane, and they become fast friends. Later, a series of mishaps takes him to London, reuniting Tarzan not only with his long lost family, but Jane as well. It is here where Tarzan and Jane learn to navigate the “urban jungle” of London, and uncover a dastardly plot to steal and sell exotic animals to the highest bidder! It is up to our heroes to figure out who is behind this sinister deed, and return the animals to their rightful homes in the jungle.

programme.title: Blippi's Spooky Spell Halloween
programme.desc: With a guidebook of Spooky Halloween Spells, Blippi investigates costumes, treats, and the art of pumpkin carving.

programme.title: The Berry Best Vacation
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top “Entertainment Tonight”-style show host/producer from Episode 206. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation. Trying to accommodate Mavis and continue their vacation doesn't work—every time the girls try to have fun together, Mavis pops up, poking a microphone in Cherry's face, insisting on treating her as if she were a Lady Gaga-type.

programme.title: The Berry Long Winter
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City—a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play “Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose.” The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing. But it turns out the Berrykins' version of the game has different rules: they zoom around on little hang gliders made of leaves!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: Billy can't stop worrying. How will the children help Billy overcome his fears?

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Pirate Tim / Playing In The Rain
programme.desc: What happens when Chalky gives Tim a mask that he can't remove?

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: Billy manages to convince Paula and the others to save Mr Explorer from a sticky situation.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Revenge Of The Kids / Fake Happiness
programme.desc: A misunderstanding angers Captain Redbeard and he does something mean to get back at the children.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Mr Totemhead's Twin / Big Wheels Turning
programme.desc: Mr. Explorer has captured Mr Totemhead! What will Paula and her friends do to save Mr Totemhead?

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Tell The Truth! / Tim's Merit Badges
programme.desc: Tim accidentally makes a mess, but he's afraid of owning up and tries to cover it up with a lie.

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.desc: This episode is all about the wonderful fantastic things that animals can do!

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.sub-title: Slow Down You Move Too Fast / Green Green Grass
programme.desc: In this episode we look at animals that move really slowwwwww.

programme.title: Billy Bunny's Animal Songs
programme.desc: Sing along with Billy Bunny as he learns lots of new songs before dinnertime!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Actions / Trash By The Ocean
programme.desc: After watching a superhero movie, all Tim wants to do is be like his hero and save the day!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The children dare each other to do stuff. It's all fun and games, until a dare goes too far.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Helpful Tim / Broken Things, Broken Friendships
programme.desc: The children are determined to support Tim in helping as many people as possible.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Pig & Panda's Rock Band / Gifts From The Heart
programme.desc: The children audition for Pig & Panda's Rock Band. Find out who will make the cut.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Talking Tom steals the show and reveals his style credentials at Talking Angela's big fashion event.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Armed with tech gear and an unfailing sense of optimism, Talking Tom and Friends are setting out to make their dreams come true!

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - The Magic Ring: A trip to meet Mr. Arnold's friends Penn and Teller leads to a magical mystery that only the Super K's can solve: what happened to Houdini's Ring?

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Time Trippers: The Super K's accidental trip through time teaches everyone that history is best left in the past.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario: Hip and Hop Koopa steal Prince Mushroomkamen's case which the Queen got angry and is looking for her son, meanwhile Mario and co are in Desert Land which the Queen mistakes Mario for her son and the heroes must get the case back. /

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Toadally Magical Adventure: Toad loses a magic wand to the Koopas. / When the Mario Brothers go back to Brooklyn, they are mistaken as babysitters to look after Junior. Mario & Luigi must control and get Junior back home.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Pop Rocks: The team learns Pop Fizz used to be a rock star, one half of the duo "Pop and the 'Gang".

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Beard Science: Kaos realizes the key to the success he covets lies in having hair... so he uses his magic to steal Master Eon's beard.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - President Possessed!: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Is Zit You or Is Zit Me?: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - The Fateful Final Battle! / Invincible Viloch: It's the final brawl of the battle judgement, old rivals Dan vs Magnus go head-to-head in an epic brawl. / Viloch's intentions are fully revealed when he's deicides to tear apart Earth and Vestoria himself.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - Geo-Forge Drago! / At the End of the Fight: Ultimate Viloch has taken it upon himself to sever the connection between Earth and Vestoria but standing in his way is Geo-Forge Drago. / Everything is on the line in this brawl! The victor will decide the fate of Earth and Vestoria.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Pizza! Pizza! Pizza! / Attack of The 50 Foot Shaq: When Sal Barzini, friend of Shaq and the owner of Tatagglia's Pizza, can't fill Shaq's big order because all his delivery people's cars are in the shop, Gronk, Himari, and Klaus are sent to help. Himari reluctantly agrees to help, but through a night of mishaps, it falls entirely on her handlebars to make all of the deliveries / Keb, a friend of Shaq, that he has mentored since he was a little kid, is now studying robotics in college and he has made him a special birthday gift: a 50-foot-tall Shaq robot! When the Shaq-Bot “breaks out” of the straps securing it and walks off the back of Biggie D while he's transporting to the garage, he, Himari, Fleming, and Keb has to find a way to get the runaway robot back under control.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Journey to the Eastern Caverns
programme.desc: Eli and the Gang find a way to take Junjie back home to the Eastern Caverns-and find a whole bunch of trouble waiting for them when they get there!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Upon returning to the Outlaws' jungle camp, the Shane Gang suffer a sneak attack from the Emperor's Underlord Holt, who steals almost all of their slugs and loads them onto the Dragon Train for transport to the Emperor. With precious few slugs to use as ammo, the Shane Gang must be extra resourceful to get them back.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In a climactic battle, Junjie and Eli confront the Emperor and the Dai-Fu as the fate of the entire Eastern Caverns hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf. But can the Shane Gang help a bad guy learn to do good?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrive at a cavern overrun by thieves terrorizing the good townfolk, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid-the only one the Eastern Caverns have ever seen. However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade. Building the new upgrade is difficult...but working with the Technician is practically impossible!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A winter-time holiday has arisen in the Eastern Caverns around the mysterious "Giver," who makes an annual visit to deliver slugs to the people of the East. But when a group of thieves make off with the Giver's precious cargo of slugs, our heroes must ride to the rescue-and discover the secret of who the Giver really is.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie recounts the ancient history of the Eastern Caverns and his ancestors, and the events that led to his downfall and transformation from the Eastern Champion to the Dark Slinger.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Pronto accidentally uses the Emperor's sword blaster, he can suddenly do no wrong. Lady Dai-Fu manipulates Underlord Holt into trapping the Shane Gang with a new superweapon: the Iron Warrior!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends and even some old enemies-to help them take down the Emperor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang return home to the 99 caverns to find Gateway Cavern overrun with slugs-in Eli's absence, the Shadow Clan have governed by putting the slugs before the people, and the result is chaos! It's up to Eli to restore the balance, but the Shadow Clan aren't as friendly as they once were...and that's saying something. Help comes from an unexpected source-Tad and his slug Pieper, who just arrived from the Surface!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro with Eli's old blaster and teaching him to live by the slugslinger's code. Tad takes to it like a natural, and as Kord says, it looks like they have another "slugslinging savant from the Surface" on their hands. But their training will be put to the test when Tad accompanies them to a showdown with the Scrap Force...and the Shadow Clan!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends

programme.title: TOBOT
programme.desc: Ryan and Kory are twin brothers with one big secret: They're Tobot pilots.

programme.title: Winx Club
programme.desc: Winx Club is a fantasy saga revolving around six fairies and their adventures. The protagonists Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa live their daily life on Magix world, among lessons, loves, quarrels and moments of strong friendship. At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Space Yoghurt
programme.desc: Migol, Popodom and Drod bump into unusual problems in space that they manage to solve in equally unusual ways, but at least everything ends well when you can laugh together. Follow the space creatures on their fun and wacky adventures!

programme.title: Invent'Tom
programme.desc: Meet Tom, Car City's very own inventor! In his high-tech lab, he creates the wackiest inventions to solve his friend's problems.

programme.title: Pincode 101-102
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: RoboFuse - Saving the Race: Zitron uses his reactors to cheat during a race, but they're very powerful and dangerous. Robo intervenes to stop Zitron.

programme.title: Tiny Town
programme.desc: Join the friendly vehicles of Tiny Town as they play games, go on adventures and solve problems together.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.sub-title: Deportada con barriga Ciudadano o terrorista

programme.title: Caso cerrado

programme.sub-title: Triángulo caliente En carpa o en la 13

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Natalia reclama su parte de la empresa de su padre que quedó en manos de mafiosos. Jazmiri quería ser actriz porno, fue víctima de un falso productor que la estafó y le pide 25 000 dólares.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.desc: Los vecinos organizan un intercambio por el Día de San Valentín, pero a nadie le gustan sus regalos. Germán le da consejos a Silvia para que conquiste a su galán.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Frankie le vende una videocasetera a Luis, pero no sirve y tiene un casete atorado. Silvita renta un cuarto en su departamento, pero su compañera le roba todo, hasta el novio.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco recupera los muebles de su casa. Ahora Toña está triste porque no aparece su perfume "Ven a mí", traído desde Oaxaca.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Fofo, el hermano de Paco, llega de visita a México, sin esposa y acompañado de una pareja un poco particular.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Macarena está por casarse y no tiene dónde hacer su despedida de soltera. Paco le ofrece su departamento para el festejo.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Rocío le reclama a Fran por tener que ir a recogerlo a la cárcel. Fran le cuenta a Rocío cómo terminó en la cárcel. Doña Ruperta, la vecina de Paco, le reclama porque ningún vecino pudo dormir por la fiesta que hizo. Los vecinos de Paco hacen una junta.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Pedro, el mejor amigo de Paco, está a punto de perder su matrimonio por engañar a su esposa, pero Paco le podría salvar la vida.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Toña les dice a Paco y Fran que va a ir a visitar a su novio a Francia, pero ellos no le creen. Paco le ofrece a Toña subirle el sueldo para que no se vaya, pero ella no acepta. Paco y Fran tratan de cocinar, pero no tienen idea de cómo hacerlo.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco se va de viaje y Fran encuentra la oportunidad perfecta para ganarse unos dólares alquilando el departamento de su papá a unos viejitos por el fin de semana unas horas más tarde el vuelo de Paco se cancela.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Fran acaba de conocer a Karime y se enamora perdidamente de ella. Solo hay un pequeño problema: Karime se casa el próximo fin de semana.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco acompaña a Fran a la boda de Karime y se encuentra con Emilia, una exalumna que reprobó en la universidad.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco es despedido de la universidad por el escándalo que se generó por Emilia y todas sus mujeres le reclaman.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco está muy triste porque lo despidieron de su trabajo por culpa de Emilia. Fran se enamora de Silvana, su psicóloga, y termina seduciéndola.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.sub-title: No me importa que me digan mujeriego
programme.desc: Paco regresa con Miranda, su exnovia, y la lleva a vivir a su casa. Todo va bien hasta que llega Lorena y el mundo se le viene abajo.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco acepta a ir a terapia con mucha gente extraña por su adicción a las mujeres jóvenes. Miranda descubre que Paco les paga a mujeres jóvenes para tener intimidad con ellas.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Jessica le dice a Carolina que su miedo desapareció gracias a los consejos de Lety Marcia le cuenta a Alicia que Fernando confesó estar enamorado de Lety Aldo lleva a Lety en motocicleta por el puerto de Acapulco.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Fernando le llama la atención a Alicia por no pasarle las llamadas y la molesta por la relación que tuvo con Tomás Teresita le propone a Marcia una alianza para sacar adelante Conceptos.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Omar le dice a Teresita quién es el dueño de Conceptos Simón le dice a Teresita y Marcia que Fernando salió de la empresa en muy malas condiciones Fernando se estaciona enfrente de la lancha de Aldo.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Fernando es sacado de un bar todo golpeado, pero logra volver a entrar Lety interviene entre Aldo y Fausto para que se reconcilien Fausto le entrega a Aldo una carta.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Lety le cuenta a Carolina que pasó toda la noche con Aldo y se dieron un beso, por lo que ya no quiere volverlo a ver Carolina le aconseja darse una oportunidad con Aldo.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Aldo le pide ayuda a Lety para cocinar para las concursantes del certamen Nuestra Belleza Lety le pide no hablar de lo que pasó entre ellos Fernando le confiesa a Omar haber ido a Acapulco para que lo mataran.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Omar y Fernando hablan a la casa de la familia Padilla, pero Julieta les cuelga las del cuartel, en compañía de Paco, Celso, Simón y Raúl, ven el certamen Nuestra Belleza por televisión.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Fernando llega a la residencia de Jorge Flores, quien le da una fórmula para eliminar la tristeza y las angustias, con el fin de volver a ser el mismo de antes, en armonía.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Vico, Celina y José pretenden juntar a Mia con Miguel y a Roberta con Diego. Teo insiste en que José sea su novia. Todos esquían en la nieve y se divierten. Alma está triste por Roberta. La mamá de Miguel busca a Franco.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gandía despide a Madariaga del colegio. Mia se pone celosa por Roberta, pero Miguel le confiesa que ellos son solo amigos. Pepa le confiesa a Alma que Roberta ya sabe que se irá a vivir a Nueva York y llora por eso. Diego besa a Roberta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia y Miguel se besan pero Gastón los interrumpe con una llamada. Por su parte, Madariaga recuerda las clases en la escuela y se pone nostálgico. Además, Diego confunde a Roberta con Paola.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Renata acusa a Madariaga de ser un asesino. Georgi le confiesa a Roberta el inmenso amor que siente por Luján. Roberta y sus compañeros del colegio idean un plan para demostrarle a Renata que Madariaga es un buen hombre.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mendiola le exige a Pascual que expulse a Madariaga del colegio. Roberta y Mia sospechan que Alma y Franco están enamorados. Renata le confiesa a Plutarco que Mendiola es su padre.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le cuenta a la prensa el amor y la admiración que siente por Alma. Alma decide detener su gira internacional para poder pasar más tiempo con Roberta. Teo idea un plan para saber si Luján está interesada en Georgi.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta besa a Facundo para agradecerle por todo el apoyo que le ha dado. Tres mujeres se aprovechan del estado de ebriedad de Diego, Giovanni y Tomás para robarles su dinero. Gastón lleva a cabo sus planes para alejar a Miguel e Mia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego se encela al saber que Roberta está saliendo con Facundo. Nico se alegra al saber que Lupita no ha dejado de amarlo. Mia idea un plan para celebrar su cumpleaños en el colegio.

programme.title: Esmeralda: Embarazo confirmado
programme.desc: Esmeralda se tortura por todo lo ocurrido y se va de la casa grande, por lo que José Armando corre a buscarla. Rodolfo trata de hablar con ella y le pide saber la verdad sobre su decisión, de modo que ella le confiesa todo.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Francisca le paga a Auxiliadora para que le entregue al hijo de Camila. Justo y Santiago sacan a Camila de la casa donde está para que Ricardo no la encuentre.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Pasado inolvidable
programme.desc: Ramiro le confiesa a Ana Laura que Ana Leticia aceptó ser su novia. Ana Laura le dice a Ramiro que Valentín quiere vengarse de él por la muerte de Gina.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Corazón lastimado
programme.desc: Sofía entristece al ver a Juan con Ruth en la cama. Sofía le exige a Gabriela que le confiese por qué mandó a matar a los padres de Juan.

programme.title: Amores con trampa: Las intrigas de Isabel
programme.desc: Santiago se entera de que Alejandra sí es su hija biológica y estalla de felicidad. Conchita anuncia que se va a trabajar a la casa de la familia Carmona. Isabel le dice a María que Facundo ya no siente nada por ella.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor: Decidido
programme.desc: Santos se siente traicionado porque Justo no cree que él sea inocente y piensa regresar a Los Ángeles a limpiar su nombre. Santos le deja en claro a María que la única mujer que le importa es ella. Leonardo descubre que Santos está en México.

programme.title: Pasión y poder: Injusticia contra Franco
programme.desc: Julia le dice a Humberto que si se mete con David o Gaby, le va a pedir a Eladio que lo encierre en el peor asilo. David escucha a Julia decirle a Gaby que va a ver a Arturo.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre: Gran boda
programme.desc: Bárbara intenta seducir a Damián para pasar una última noche con él. Bárbara sospecha que Damián en verdad está enamorado de Fernanda. Erika entristece al ver a Camilo con Natasha. Fernanda cumple su sueño y se casa con Damián.

programme.title: Aquellos años
programme.desc: Una reseña de la lucha del presidente Benito Juárez contra los conservadores y la intervención francesa.

programme.title: El Cielo y Tú

programme.title: El reventón
programme.desc: Un joven pierde en apuestas fuerte suma de dinero y su padre lo echa de su casa, después se envuelve con delincuentes.

programme.title: Las Golfas

programme.title: Los juniors
programme.desc: Tres amigos ingresan voluntariamente a un monasterio, dentro del cual se realiza un reportaje. El abad habla con ellos para brindarles confianza y ellos le cuentan las oscuras razones por las que se ordenaron en el monasterio.

programme.title: Marejada
programme.desc: Un médico va a trabajar a la costa, pero el presidente municipal lo recibe con indiferencia y solo se hace amigo de un niño.

programme.desc: Un viejo artista cuenta la historia de María Candelaria quien se enamora perdidamente de Lorenzo Rafael, pero su amor se verá manchado por los prejuicios de un pueblo que la desprecia.

programme.title: México nunca duerme
programme.desc: Una joven va con su novio a bailar y la abuela de ella sale a buscarla de noche en delegaciones, discotecas y cabarets.

programme.title: Vainilla, bronce y morir
programme.desc: Un hombre recuerda cuando se enamoró de una joven, y le propone fugarse con él pues su padre la quiere casar con otro.

programme.desc: Un hombre recién casado comienza a desconfiar de su esposa pues descubre que no le dijo su verdadero nombre. El hombre le pide ayuda a un amigo para investigar a su mujer, ella finalmente le cuenta la verdad.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A cada uno le toca escoger
programme.desc: Un joven se va de su casa porque su padrastro lo maltrataba, su abuela se pasa buscándolo, pero él no quiere regresar con su familia y conoce a una mujer que lo utiliza para robar al lado de otros niños de la calle.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Javier, un diseñador lleno de sueños y proyectos, trabaja con su novia. Juntos trabajan en un proyecto que les dará reconocimiento a su agencia de publicidad. Javier, enamorado de su Lulú, desea formalizar su compromiso.

programme.title: Paul Desmond, Dave Brubeck & Joe Morello
programme.sub-title: Dave Brubeck and Paul Desmond live in Belgium
programme.desc: Dave Brubeck: Live in '64 boasts a beautifully filmed concert from one of the most beloved quartets in jazz history. Captured at the pinnacle of their power and popularity, Paul Desmond (alto sax), Joe Morello (drums), Eugene Wright (bass) and Dave Brubeck (piano) explore the trails they blazed into the realm of odd time signatures with ‘Forty Days' and two versions of their groundbreaking hit ‘Take Five', as well as forays into world music with a unique exploration of ‘Koto Song'. Their intimate onstage chemistry and impeccable musicianship made the DBQ an award-winning jazz supergroup.

programme.title: Dino Saluzzi, Charlie Mariano & Wolfgang Dauner
programme.sub-title: Saluzzi, Mariano & Dauner live in Stuttgart
programme.desc: Dino Saluzzi, one of Argentina's tango music masters, has been building his legacy since the mid-1980s. His accordion-like bandoneon defines Argentina's tango music. Saluzzi has explored many paths—paths along which he has rarely travelled more than once, despite some common threads. This rare, vibrant and intense performance is an intimate collaboration with Charlie Mariano (saxophone) and Wolfgang Dauner (piano) and features music ranging from tango and classical music to international favorites.

programme.title: Antibalas, Bettye LaVette, José James & Alice Russell
programme.desc: To close its 2019 edition, Jazz à la Villette pays tribute to the queen of soul Aretha Franklin, who died in the summer of 2018. The musical direction of the evening has been entrusted to Antibalas, an Afrobeat group from Brooklyn attached to the Daptones label, accompanied for the occasion by several guest singers: Bettye LaVette, José James, Alice Russell, Nona Hendryx & Zara McFarlane.

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Tom Excell, Pilo Adami, Nick Richards & Finn Booth
programme.desc: Since 1985, the Dutch city of Nijmegen has been welcoming the International Music Meeting Festival every Pentecost. Ranging from jazz and improvisational music to traditional music and unique crossovers, this adventurous festival is all about musical encounters and international collaborations. In 2019, the band Nubiyan Twist performs at the International Music Meeting Festival. This London-based group operates on the intersection of soul and jazz.

programme.title: Ted Curson
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Ryan Porter & Kamasi Washington
programme.sub-title: Ryan Porter & The West Coast Get Down - BIRD
programme.desc: Los Angeles-born saxophonist Kamasi Washington and trombonist Ryan Porter co-founded West Coast Get Down – a musical collective fusing jazz and funk with hip-hop. It is partly because of this collective that jazz saw a resurgence in Los Angeles, subtly eclipsing the long-established jazz mecca of the world, New York City. The two musicians join forces and take the vibes of Los Angeles to jazz club BIRD in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.

programme.title: Thomas Dunford
programme.sub-title: Works for lute by J. S. Bach
programme.desc: French lutenist Thomas Dunford performs various works for lute by J. S. Bach in this intimate chamber music concert, recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, in 2017. On the program are Suite for lute in G minor, BWV 995 Suite for solo cello in G major (arr. for lute), BWV 1007 and Chaconne from Partita for solo violin in D minor (arr. lute), BWV 1004. Paris-born lutenist Thomas Dunford (*1988) discovered the lute at the age of nine. He studied at the Conservatory of Paris and the Schola Cantorum in Basel, and participated in masterclasses with lutenists such as Rolf Lislevand and Julian Bream. He has made various solo and ensemble appearances at Europe's most prestigious festivals.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Lily Maisky, Iddo Bar-Shai & Tedi Papavrami
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration III
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored chamber music repertoire in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Lily Maisky and Iddo Bar-Shaï, violinists Tedi Papavrami and Akiko Suwanai, her daughter Lyda Chen-Argerich on viola, and cellist Mischa Maisky. On the program are Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio No. 1 in D minor, Op. 49 Leoš Janáček's Violin Sonata Franz Schubert's Rondo in A major, D. 951 and Johannes Brahms's Piano Quartet No. 3 in C minor, Op. 60. These performances were recorded on May 4 and June 13, 2021.

programme.title: Mariss Jansons
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon, Olga Kern & Sol Gabetta
programme.desc: American conductor Leonard Slatkin leads the Orchestre National de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in 2014. The concert opens with William Bolcom´s Circus Ouverture, which was specially composed for Slatkin's 70th birthday. The concert continues with a performance of Beethoven's Triple Concerto in C, Op. 56 performed by three female soloists: Olga Kern (piano), Baibe Skride (violin) and Sol Gabetta (cello). The work is the only concerto which Beethoven ever completed for more than one solo instrument. The concert closes with Ravel's beloved orchestration of Mussorgsky's Pictures at an Exhibition.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Works by Bach, Bartók, and Brahms
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra in an exciting concert program consisting of works by J. S. Bach, Béla Bartók, and Johannes Brahms. The program opens with Bach's Brandenburg Concerto No. 3 in G major, BWV 1048. This is followed by one of Bartók's best-known pieces: Music for strings, percussion and celesta. Remarkable is the work's instrumentation: Bartók divided the strings into two groups that are placed on opposite sides of the stage, to create antiphonal effects. The program ends with Brahms's Symphony No. 3 in F major, Op. 90. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on December 4, 2017.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix
programme.desc: In June 1967, Jimi Hendrix returned to his native country and transformed the cultural, musical and fashion landscapes. Punctuated by Hendrix lighting his instrument on fire, the U.S. debut performance of the Jimi Hendrix Experience at the Monterey Pop Festival propelled the guitarist and his band mates to the top ranks of international rock royalty.

programme.title: Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Filmed live from the Vic Theatre, Chicago, Illinois, USA in April 2003 for the 'Soundstage' TV series.

programme.title: George Thorogood & the Destroyers
programme.desc: George Thorogood is an American icon. In a career that stretches back to the mid-seventies, he and his band The Destroyers have released 16 studio albums with worldwide sales in excess of 15 million. 2013 saw George & The Destroyers make their long overdue debut at the legendary Montreux Jazz Festival. Performing at an event that had previously played host to many of their musical heroes inspired the band to produce one of their finest performances on a set list that stretched back to their eponymous debut album from 1977 and right up to their most recent releases. This is goodtime rocking blues and nobody does it better than George Thorogood & The Destroyers.
